final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand exposure splash screen for OPPO Find X9 Ultra, designed for full-screen mobile display with visual impact as the primary objective.

Style/medium: bold brand advertising with the confident clarity of contemporary tech marketing, designed for instant recognition
Composition: full-screen vertical layout, OPPO and Find X9 Ultra branding as dominant visual anchor, centered weight with generous breathing room around logo
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone product hero shot, sleek and premium
Scene/backdrop: clean gradient or abstract tech environment that elevates the product without distraction
Lighting/mood: dramatic product lighting with high contrast, the polished precision of flagship tech photography
Color palette: OPPO brand colors with high saturation for maximum visual punch, tension between cool tech tones and warm accent highlights
Materials/textures: brushed metal and glass surfaces catching light, the smooth precision of premium device manufacturing
Text (verbatim): OPPO, Find X9 Ultra
Constraints: 1080×1920 aspect ratio optimized, brand exposure priority, visual impact over information density, all text legible at glance
Avoid: cluttered information, small text, muted tones, generic stock aesthetic
